---
title: "Attributes"
format: html
---

---

## Goalkeepers

- ShotStopping 

- Passing 

- LongBalls 

- CrossStopping

- Sweeping

## Wing Backs

- Scoring

- ShotAcc

- Passing

- Progression

- Creativity

- Assisting

- Crossing

- Dribbling

- Tackling

- Blocking

- Heading

- Pressing

## Central Defenders 

- Shooting

- Passing

- Progression

- Creativity

- Assisting

- Crossing

- Tackling

- Blocking

- Heading

## Midfielders

- Scoring

- ShotAcc

- Passing

- LongBalls

- Progression

- Creativity

- Assisting

- Crossing

- Dribbling

- Tackling

- Blocking

- Pressing

## Forwards

- Scoring

- ShotAcc

- LongBalls

- Passing

- Progression

- Creativity

- Assisting

- Crossing

- Dribbling

- Heading

- Pressing
